text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find King Halo grumbling about something when
I walk into the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urk... I simply cannot gain any more weight!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In order to maintain my first-rate beauty, I need
to refrain from eating sweets for the time being...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Well... I was thinking about going on
a diet.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After all, physique is really important for an
Umamusume. Don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We need to be strong and limber in races, yet
also elegant and light on our feet at winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
To be first-rate, I must enchant everyone with my
performance both on the stage and on the track.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, as my trainer, please give me your full
support!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll need you to accompany me on my early
morning runs, track my calorie intake for me,
and...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll need your careful discretion every day to
maintain my first-rate beauty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I work with King Halo to help her stay in
peak condition.
